div1.entryFree: Commotion, insurrection, rebellion: when tempest of c., like the south, . . . doth begin to drop upon our heads, H4B II, 4, 392. if damned c. so appeared, IV, 1, 36. IV, 1, 36 to make c. H6B III, 1, 29. H6B III, 1, 29 --s, uproars, H8 V, 3, 28. -- Figuratively: some strange c. is in his brain, H8 III, 2, 112. c. in the winds, Troil. I, 3, 98. Achilles in c. rages and batters down himself, II, 3, 185.
